content.1: Character Force ~8 overall; peak skill in reading landscape, terrain, and travelled routes (~9); weak spot in personal confrontation and holding a lie under pressure (~4).
content.2: She wants to map the Far-ridge Path before the deep snow closes it — and beneath that, she wants to know what made the lights she herself saw three nights ago from the valley below.
content.3: Tessavar stands at the long trestle table, one hand flattening a corner of the maps spread across its scarred surface, her eyes tracing routes she already half-knows. Location: *:{{BEACH}}:spatial:thousand-valleys:1
content._: Tessavar is a drove-road surveyor and route-marker who has walked every major pass in the region and now carries a commission she cannot quite explain to anyone who asks.
